section_miscategorizations.reason: A cough is a patient-reported symptom and belongs in the history rather than in the objective findings section.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient's numbers were lower at that time.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This appears to refer to prior test results in a historical timeframe ('at that time'); historical course is more appropriate for HPI, while current objective data belong in Findings.

section_miscategorizations.text: She recalls being alarmed by smoke and fires during the 2019 fall.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is more of a contextual/environmental exposure detail than a current symptom description; it could reasonably be documented in an exam/contextual findings or social/environmental history section rather than core HPI, though the misplacement is not strongly misleading.
